changeSet.author: hrms
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE payroll_runs ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY, tenant_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, payroll_month INTEGER NOT NULL, payroll_year INTEGER NOT NULL, start_date DATE NOT NULL, end_date DATE NOT NULL, payment_date DATE, status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, total_employees INTEGER DEFAULT 0, total_gross_amount DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0, total_deductions DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0, total_net_amount DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0, processed_by VARCHAR(255), processed_at TIMESTAMP, approved_by VARCHAR(255), approved_at TIMESTAMP, remarks TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, version BIGINT DEFAULT 0 );
CREATE INDEX idx_payroll_runs_tenant ON payroll_runs(tenant_id); CREATE INDEX idx_payroll_runs_period ON payroll_runs(payroll_year, payroll_month); CREATE INDEX idx_payroll_runs_status ON payroll_runs(status); CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_payroll_runs_unique ON payroll_runs(tenant_id, payroll_year, payroll_month);
